word: H2052 - וָהֵב - Vâhêb - vaw-habe' - What he did

sections.paragraph:
Original: והב

Transliteration: vâhêb

Phonetic: vaw-habe'

BDB Definition:

Vaheb of Waheb = "now, come on: and do thou give"
  1. a place in Moab, site unknown

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
